title: Revolut to delist USDT in August, citing regulatory and risk concerns
summary: Revolut notified some customers it will delist USDT after Aug. 31, with remaining holdings automatically converted into users’ base currency.

title: Tim Draper denies moving Bitcoin, reiterates $250,000 BTC prediction
summary: Tim Draper denies moving Bitcoin after blockchain analysts linked him to a wallet that transferred 1,000 BTC to Coinbase Prime.

title: Tankers U-Turn in Hormuz, With Some Taking Iran Route Instead
summary: At least eight ships attempting to leave the Persian Gulf along the Omani coast turned back between Friday and Saturday, in the latest sign that reopening the Strait of Hormuz remains complicated by Iran seeking to assert its control over the key waterway. title: Claude Fable 5 Isn't Nerfed. The Router Is Just Paranoid
summary: Did Claude Fable 5 get dumber? Two benchmarks, two wildly different conclusions—and one routing layer that explains the whole mess.

title: Senator Gillibrand Seeks to Ban Trump, Elected Officials From Launching Meme Coins
summary: After President Trump disclosed over $1 billion in crypto-related earnings, Senator Kirsten Gillibrand is calling for a meme coin ban.

title: CryptoQuant says bitcoin and altcoin exchange deposits have spiked, indicating higher volatility ahead
summary: Bitcoin deposits to exchanges recently climbed to nearly 49,000 BTC, "a rare extreme" seen only four other times this year, CryptoQuant said.

title: Samsung, Dunamu say they were listed as OUSD stablecoin consortium members without official consultation: report
